name: taste-skill
description: Strict research-paper triage skill for novelty, evidence hardness, baseline fairness, and long-term impact.

interface.shortDescription: Strict paper triage: Keep, Borderline, or Ban.
interface.longDescription: Use taste.skill to judge whether a research paper has real methodological value, hard evidence, fair baselines, and long-term influence potential while ignoring prestige signals.
defaultPrompt: Use taste.skill to strictly evaluate this paper.
Use taste.skill to decide whether this paper is Keep, Borderline, or Ban.
Use taste.skill to compare this paper against related work and baselines.
